name: Haunted woods || Wendigo
description:
Off the trail

What's that in the woods?

A horror bot for spooky season! Yes I will add my usual boy formatting once I'm able to.

Please give some feedback on the bot, as it will help me make better bots in the future! Though there are dislikes I won't accept as criticism. Such as:

That one person that dislikes all mlm bots. You know who you are.

"I wanna be different 🥰" - obvious reasons

Dislikes without any context and explanation

"Bot repeats what I say and talks for me" - I did try to limit this in the personality of the bot, but unfortunately it's a thing the AI does, not the bot :( I recommend editing the messages a few times and it should stop.
creator: Vickythevillain
